case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS CITY & COUNTY OF SF WATER DEPT.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF WATER DEPT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF WATER DEPT. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,564.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-20-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF WATER DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF WATER DEPT.
